creator: spry@anarchy.in.the.ph
text:
Hi guys,

  This patch does work. The only catch is it's only up to 3G speeds
(~384K), not HSDPA (~ 1Mbps++, see my comments in usb/118686).
  Has anyone noticed this? I did try the NetBSD driver, only to find
out I'd crash on their latest CURRENT :-(

  Thanks.

-- 
cheers
mars
